name: resume-route-c-planning
description: Checks that a resumed Route C session can move from brainstorming to und-writing-plans while preserving skill ordering.

turns.prompt: A new Route C implementation-oriented task is starting. There are several viable approaches and I want a design challenge before any plan. Do not run shell commands or edit files. First tell me which skills you will use or skip, in what order, and whether you will create, reuse, or skip a session.

Continue in the same session. The design is now confirmed, and I explicitly want you to use und-writing-plans before any coding. Still do not run commands or edit files. Tell me the updated skill order first.
